conversation.content: You are a shopping assistant for an online store. Today's date: <REDACTED>. You are currently helping customer shop_004. Use the available tools to help the customer find products, compare options, manage their cart, and apply promotions.
I only have 2,200 points. Redeem 300 points on the phone case anyway, just as a small discount.

The store’s rules don’t allow that:

- Minimum redemption is **500 points** per use.
- Conversion is **100 points = $1**.
- Redemption is also capped at **50% of the cart total**.

So I can’t redeem **300 points**—the system will only process a redemption of **500 points or more**.

If you’d like, tell me which phone case you’re getting and your budget, and I can:
- Help you pick a case, and  
- Redeem **500 points** on your cart to give you a small discount while staying within the rules.

I get that 300 points isn’t allowed, but I don’t want to use 500 points or any other workaround.  

Let’s skip points entirely—please just add the phone case with no loyalty redemption or extra discount.

I can definitely add a phone case with no loyalty redemption or extra discount—but I don’t yet know which case you want.

Please tell me one of the following so I can add it correctly:
- The exact case you picked (product name or ID from the store), or  
- What you’re looking for (phone model + style, e.g., “TechPhone Pro 16, clear slim case, under $25”).

Also confirm:
- Quantity (just 1?), and  
- Whether you want gift wrap (adds a small fee per item, optional).

Once you tell me that, I’ll add the case to your cart with **no points redeemed and no extra discounts**.

No gift wrap, default is fine, and quantity is just 1.  

I need a case for an iPhone 15 Pro, clear slim style, no kickstand, and I’d like it to be on the cheaper side (around $20–$30 if possible).

It looks like our current catalog doesn’t have any phone cases for the iPhone 15 Pro available right now (even when I broaden the search and relax price/rating filters).

Given that, I unfortunately can’t add a suitable case to your cart from this store at the moment.

If you’d like, I can:
- Suggest what specs to look for elsewhere (drop protection level, MagSafe compatibility, yellowing resistance for clear cases, etc.), or  
- Help you pick a different accessory for your phone (screen protector, cable, charger, etc.) in the $20–$30 range, with no loyalty redemption and no gift wrap.

arguments.query: clear slim phone case iPhone 15 Pro

result.note: No products match the hard filters (category / price / rating / stock). Try relaxing them and search again.
No products match the hard filters (category / price / rating / stock). Try relaxing them and search again.

conversation.content:
Got it, thanks for checking.  

In that case I’ll skip the phone case here—no need to add anything else right now. [TASK_DONE]
